headline: Dollar Tree amended its Chief Merchandising Officer succession timeline, with Brent Beebe now assuming the role on February 1, 2026, prior to Richard McNeely's retirement in April 2026.
investor_impact: This minor acceleration of a previously announced succession plan allows the incoming CMO to take the helm at the start of the new fiscal year. The update provides operational clarity for the merchandising team but does not materially alter the fundamental investment thesis.
key_figures: February 1, 2026 (Date Brent Beebe assumes CMO role)
End of fiscal year 2025 (Date McNeely steps down as CMO)
